title: Revive Core
description: Hardcore death-ban plugin with revival mechanics and self-revive protection.
body:
**ReviveCore** is a hardcore death-ban plugin for Paper 1.21.x servers.
It introduces a unique revival system that gives players a second chance after being death-banned.

Join the discord to contact me about bug-reports or suggestions!

**✨ Features:**
> - Death-ban system: players are banned upon death, adding hardcore tension.
> - Reviver items: craftable items that allow self-revival or reviving others.
> - Admin commands for controlled revival and item distribution.
> - Permissions for fine-grained access control.
> - Built-in reload command for quick adjustments.

**🔧 Commands:**
> - /revive <player> — Revive yourself or another player.
> 
**OP Commands:**
> - /adminrevive <player> — Admin-only revival without items.
> - /givereviver [player] — Give a Reviver item.
> - /revivereload — Reload the plugin configuration.

**📜 Permissions:**
> - reviver.use — Allows /revive
> - reviver.admin — Allows /adminrevive and /givereviver
> - reviver.reload — Allows /revivereload

**⚙️ Installation:**
> 1. Download the latest ReviveCore jar from the Releases tab.
> 2. Place it into your server’s `/plugins` folder.
> 3. Restart the server.
> 4. Adjust messages and settings in `config.yml` as needed.
